welcome.main: PLM - Penalty League Mobin Welcome to the luxury penalty competition bot. Choose an option:

pages.guide: 📘 Guide 1) Join and register your profile. 2) Wait for admin to assign matches. 3) In each round choose your direction quickly and only once. 4) Results and leaderboard are generated automatically.
pages.rules: 📜 Rules • Matches are 3 or 5 rounds. • Roles switch automatically every round. • Valid directions: Left, Center, Right. • One direction submit per player per round. • Round result is confirmed by admin (Goal/Save/Out).

register.invalid_name: ❌ Invalid name. Please enter 2-40 valid characters.
register.invalid_country: ❌ Invalid country. Please enter 2-40 valid characters.

match.no_active: ℹ️ You are not in an active match right now.
match.already_selected: ⏳ You already selected your direction for this round.
match.direction_rejected: ❌ Unable to save direction (already set or invalid round).
match.round_start_shooter: ⚽ Round {round_no} started. You are the SHOOTER. Submit your direction.
match.round_start_keeper: 🧤 Round {round_no} started. You are the GOALKEEPER. Submit your direction.

ranking.title: 🏆 Leaderboard
ranking.line: {idx}) {name} | Pts:{points} | MP:{played} W:{win} D:{draw} L:{loss} GD:{gd}

admin.not_enough_players: At least 2 registered players are required.
admin.same_player_error: ❌ Player 1 and Player 2 cannot be the same.

🧠 Round decision required
Match #{match_id} | Round {round_no}

admin.result_rejected: Result already set or invalid request.
